case_title: RICHARD THOMAS VS. EVETTE TAYLOR MONACHINO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, RICHARD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY THOMAS, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT MONACHINO, EVETTE TAYLOR TRUSTEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-21-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>);REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE TIME EXPIRED FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT MONACHINO, EVETTE TAYLOR TRUSTEE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED AUG-24-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONACHINO, EVETTE TAYLOR TRUSTEE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONACHINO, EVETTE TAYLOR TRUSTEE DEFENDANT, EVETTE TAYLOR MONACHINO, IS NOT A PROPER PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
